article_title: Sales in a manufacturer picnic area

briefs.title: BC Liquor Manufacturers Can Now Sell Drinks by the Glass in Picnic Areas
briefs.summary: BC updated its liquor rules to let manufacturers sell and serve their own products by the glass in a designated picnic sale area, not just offer samples. The total size of all picnic areas combined must stay under 1,000 square metres.
briefs.action_required: Apply via the BC liquor and cannabis licensing portal to add a sale area or convert your TESA to a permanent picnic endorsement.
